description: Pipedrive is a sales CRM for tracking leads and deals, with visual pipelines, automated follow-ups, reporting, and 500+ integrations, built for small teams.
overview: Pipedrive helps sales teams manage leads and deals with visual pipelines, automated follow-ups, and real-time reporting, integrating with email, calendars, and hundreds of apps.
what_is: Pipedrive is a sales CRM built to keep deals moving. It centers on visual pipelines, organized customer data, and automated follow-ups, with AI features that speed up everyday sales work, and it is known for being easy to adopt.

It is strongest at managing sales workflows, nurturing leads automatically, and surfacing real-time insight. Setup is quick and the integrations are ready to go, so teams usually see value within days and spend less time on admin.

Pipedrive sits in the stack as the CRM core, connecting with email, calendars, and 500+ apps. It is not built for ERP or heavily customized enterprise workflows; it suits sales teams wanting a straightforward, capable CRM.
